arts.ttl: Celtic UCL opponent suspend key player for breach of discipline - 'no place for egos'
arts.sum: Celtic's next Champions League opponents have suspended one of their key players for a breach of discipline

arts.ttl: 'You watch...' Chris Sutton drops Celtic truth to Kris Boyd after his Rangers rant
arts.sum: Chris Sutton tells Kris Boyd that Celtic are on a ‘different level’ in the forward areas than Rangers Half of the teams, prior to this weekend, in the Scottish Premiership have scored more than Rangers, it’s not right.”

arts.ttl: Watch: Aberdeen win title with draw against Celtic in 1985
arts.sum: Travel back to 1985 and a title-deciding match between Scottish Premier Division champions Aberdeen and Celtic.

arts.ttl: Even with 10-point likelihood, Croatian media bills Celtic Zagreb visit as 'must-win'
arts.sum: Croatian media casts doubts on 10 points being enough to secure UCL progression, billing Celtic visit as must-win for Zagreb

arts.ttl: Ross County man delivers honest verdict after Celtic drubbing last weekend
arts.sum: Jordan White provides Ross County reaction to Celtic thrashing Celtic made another statement last weekend against Ross County in a dominant 5-0 victory to extend their lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership.

arts.ttl: Ally McCoist braces for Neil Lennon 'destruction' as Rangers hero takes his Celtic medicine live on radio
arts.sum: McCoist feared Lennon was about to destroy him when he brought up Celtic

arts.ttl: Aberdeen vs Celtic: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Celtic are primed for their trip to Pittodrie as Brendan Rodgers looks to extend his side’s lead over Aberdeen to seven points on Wednesday evening. Celtic travel to face Aberdeen on Wednesday, December 3rd in the Scottish Premiership at Pittodrie.

arts.ttl: Celtic hit with another double UEFA punishment and a 'slap on the wrist' for Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: No strangers to fines from the European governing body this season, in the Bhoys’ defeat to Borussia Dortmund the Celtic was punished by UEFA for the use of pyro and hit with a €20,000 fine. Two wins, two draws and just a single defeat have Celtic in the Champions League driving seat but despite that, the Hoops have just felt the disciplinary hand of UEFA for incidents in the games against RB Leipzig and Atalanta.

The Scottish Premiership's current top two teams go head-to-head in this midweek meeting, as Aberdeen host Celtic at Pittodrie. Aberdeen have been punished twice in the capital, after a crazy 3-3 dra...

arts.ttl: Out of favour Celtic midfielder could be MLS bound in the January transfer window
arts.sum: An out of favour Celtic winger could be on the cusp of leaving Glasgow's east end
